title: Internal Release Note: PM Operating Rhythm Automation
summary: This release adds bi-weekly status mail generation, meeting-note extraction, and linked workflow runtime state for ProductOS PM operations.

claims.claim: This release adds governed PM operating automation around status, meetings, and runtime visibility.

classification_rationale: The release adds meaningful PM operating capability without changing the core ProductOS operating model destructively.
known_limitations: Broader post-launch customer communication remains out of scope for this internal release note.
followup_support_path: Use the runtime support queue and provenance warnings doc for rollout questions.
